name: Sippie Wallace
abstract: Sippie Wallace (born Beulah Belle Thomas; November 1, 1898 – November 1, 1986) was an American blues singer, pianist and songwriter. Her early career in tent shows gained her the billing "The Texas Nightingale".

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy and Jeannie Cheatham
about_quotes.evidence: we told her what ideas we had about bringing Big Mama and Sippie Wallace and myself together — three generations of the blues.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy and Jeannie Cheatham interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Diego, California, February 12, 1998
